---
title: "ML Summer School 2026 — Lab exercises"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.callout-important}
## Lab tasks moved

Afternoon exercises are now on the **[lab exercises home](index.qmd)** — one microbiome dataset, numbered tasks for **Day 1**, **Day 2**, and **Day 4**, each with a **“Do after”** link to the matching lecture section.

**[Open lab exercises →](index.qmd)**
:::

**Also:** [Curriculum outline](../curriculum-outline.qmd) · [Microbiome data card](../data/cards/microbiome-mouse-16s.qmd)
